overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a soldier character walking through a rural Latin American village with colorful stucco buildings, tropical vegetation, and mountain backdrops under a partly cloudy sky. The character moves at a steady walking pace through residential streets and past parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with massive banyan tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beside a massive tree trunk with aerial roots

entered.detail: massive tree trunk with thick aerial roots casting deep shadows across the street
two-story residential building with green painted exterior and white trim
pink painted house with red tile roof and multiple windows
gray concrete walking path with curb separating it from the road
exposed reddish soil between the sidewalk and the tree base

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk dominated by a massive banyan tree on the left. A green stucco building stands in the background while a pink house is visible on the right. The scene is brightly lit with strong shadows cast by the tropical sun.

events.description: character turns left at the intersection onto the main road

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, navigating around parked vehicles, and turning left onto the main road

entered.detail: white commercial van parked on the dirt shoulder with black markings on the side
silver gray pickup truck parked behind the white van
tall yellow building with weathered paint and wooden construction scaffolding on the facade
paved road intersection with visible crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more open intersection area with parked vehicles on the left. A prominent yellow building with wooden scaffolding becomes visible in the distance. The character executes a left turn onto the main road, transitioning from the residential sidewalk to the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: main road with commercial buildings and utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking along the main road passing the yellow building with scaffolding on the right side

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars carrying electrical wires
multiple black electrical wires stretching across the road between poles
two-story brown building with weathered exterior on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the main road with the yellow building now prominent on the right. Utility poles and power lines run parallel to the street. The building's wooden scaffolding becomes more detailed as the character approaches and passes it.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside with cinder block walls and commercial signage

events.description: ground surface transitions from pure asphalt to sections with exposed red dirt and gravel

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside passing weathered walls and commercial signs, with a distant pedestrian visible ahead

notable_agents.action: distant figure in blue clothing walking along the opposite side of the road

entered.detail: unfinished concrete block wall with exposed mortar and wooden supports
colorful commercial sign advertising 'POLLOS' with chicken imagery mounted on a wall
colorful painted graffiti art on the cinder block wall including abstract designs
old rusted pickup truck visible behind the wall in a yard area
tall palm tree with spreading fronds visible above the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower section of road bordered by cinder block walls with colorful graffiti and commercial signage. A 'Pollos' sign is prominently displayed on the right. The ground shows exposed red dirt patches, and a distant pedestrian can be seen walking ahead on the left side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a residential neighborhood that gradually transitions into a more commercial village street. It begins on a sun-drenched sidewalk beside a massive banyan tree, flanked by a green stucco building and a pink house. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into an intersection with parked vehicles before the camera turns left onto an asphalt road. The view then shifts to follow the main street, passing under utility lines and alongside a prominent yellow building encased in wooden scaffolding. Finally, the environment narrows into a corridor of cinder block walls adorned with colorful graffiti and a Pollos sign, with the paved road giving way to patches of exposed red dirt.
